message:
chore(engine): register causal_regret_evidence_gate module + test cleanup + beads updates

- lib.rs: Register pub mod causal_regret_evidence_gate (new gate module added
  by concurrent agent)
- tee_attestation_policy.rs: Simplify serde roundtrip test by removing
  redundant snake_case format assertion, now validates roundtrip only
- .beads/issues.jsonl: Close completed milestones (bd-mjh3.11.5 Track E
  verification/fuzz/formal coverage sprint, bd-mjh3.11.6 Track F
  toolchain/ecosystem/adoption, bd-mjh3.11.7 cross-track handoff protocol);
  update bd-mjh3.11.8 swarm control loop implementation status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
